svg.style: --use-bg-display: var(--bg-display, block); --use-headset-display: var(--headset-display, block); --use-headset-fill: var(--headset-fill, #150926); --use-accent-color: var(--accent-color, #40E0D0); --use-glow-filter: var(--glow-filter, url(#glow)); --use-orbit-play-state: var(--orbit-play-state, running);

circle.style: fill:var(--use-accent-color); filter:var(--use-glow-filter); offset-rotate: 0deg; offset-path: path('M 77.46 320.98 A 190 75 -20 1 1 434.54 191.02 A 190 75 -20 1 1 77.46 320.98'); animation: orbit-path 12s linear 0s infinite; animation-play-state: var(--use-orbit-play-state);

fill:var(--use-accent-color); filter:var(--use-glow-filter); offset-rotate: 0deg; offset-path: path('M 77.46 320.98 A 190 75 -20 1 1 434.54 191.02 A 190 75 -20 1 1 77.46 320.98'); animation: orbit-path 12s linear -6s infinite; animation-play-state: var(--use-orbit-play-state);

fill:var(--use-accent-color); offset-rotate: 0deg; offset-path: path('M 83.98 135.55 A 210 60 35 1 1 428.02 376.45 A 210 60 35 1 1 83.98 135.55'); animation: orbit-path 15s linear 0s infinite; animation-play-state: var(--use-orbit-play-state);

fill:var(--use-accent-color); filter:var(--use-glow-filter); offset-rotate: 0deg; offset-path: path('M 83.98 135.55 A 210 60 35 1 1 428.02 376.45 A 210 60 35 1 1 83.98 135.55'); animation: orbit-path 15s linear -7.5s infinite; animation-play-state: var(--use-orbit-play-state);
